title: Squirrel Removal in Woodmere, NY | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Woodmere, Long Island. Humane trapping, exclusion & attic cleanup. Serving the Five Towns area. Call for fast, effective squirrel control today!
intro: Dealing with squirrels in your Woodmere attic or walls? Best Pest Control NYC provides expert squirrel removal services throughout the Five Towns community, protecting your home from damage and noise. Our licensed technicians use humane trapping methods and permanent exclusion solutions to keep squirrels out for good.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Woodmere and Long Island communities, Best Pest Control NYC understands the unique challenges posed by local squirrel populations in residential neighborhoods. We offer same-day service, transparent pricing, and guaranteed results that protect both your property and local wildlife.
localContext: Woodmere's tree-lined streets and beautiful single-family homes near Woodmere Country Club and Woodmere Academy provide ideal conditions for squirrel activity, especially during fall and winter months. The mature oak and maple trees throughout the Peninsula Boulevard area create highways for squirrels seeking warm attics and crawl spaces in nearby homes.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Woodmere?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Woodmere typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and required exclusion work. This includes humane trapping, full property inspection, entry point sealing, and follow-up visits to ensure complete removal.

faqs.question: What time of year are squirrels most active in Woodmere?
faqs.answer: Squirrels in Woodmere are most active during fall (September-November) when they seek warm shelter for winter, and in spring (March-May) during breeding season. You'll often hear scratching and scurrying sounds in attics and walls during early morning and evening hours when they're most active.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Woodmere home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service in Woodmere and can typically complete initial trapping within 3-7 days, depending on the number of squirrels present. Complete exclusion work to seal entry points is usually finished within 1-2 weeks, with follow-up monitoring to ensure no squirrels return.

faqs.question: Do squirrels cause damage to homes in Woodmere?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels can cause significant damage to Woodmere homes by chewing through roof vents, fascia boards, and siding to gain entry. Once inside, they gnaw on electrical wiring (creating fire hazards), damage insulation, and leave droppings that can contaminate attic spaces. Prompt removal prevents costly repairs.
